chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 564 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh cases 1. For orders on CMA No.2323/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on Office objection at Flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.2324/2023 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 22.03.2023 Petitioner Qurban Ali Channa is present in person <><><><>..<><><><> Through instant Constitutional Petition, the petitioner, who is present in person, seeks direction to Respondent No.2 (Director, Anti-Corruption Establishment, Karachi) to decide his complaint within thirty days and to take measures in accordance with the law. The case of the petitioner is that the respondents, who are serving in Shikarpur and Larkana Region, have committed corruption. The subject-matter involved in the instant petition does not come within the territorial jurisdiction of this Court so much so the Respondents No.4 to 9 are performing their duties outside the territorial jurisdiction of this Court, hence this Petition is dismissed in limine along with listed applications; leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail his remedy before the appropriate forum in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
